# iso-42005-impact-mcp

> ISO/IEC 42005:2025 AI Impact Assessment MCP — runs full lifecycle impact assessment across 6 phases × 7 impact categories. Cross-walks to EU AI Act + ISO 42001. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- list_phases
- impact_categories
- assess_phase
- run_full_impact_assessment
- sign_attestation
- cross_walk_eu_ai_act
- cross_walk_iso_42001

## Install
```
pip install iso-42005-impact-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/iso-42005-impact-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
